name: Enable autonomous git commit on pipeline success
desc: After every successful HCFullPipeline run, auto-commit changed files with message 'auto(pipeline): cycle-N HCFP stage results' via auto-commit-deploy.js

name: Enable autonomous deploy to Cloud Run on green tests
desc: After auto-commit, if all quality gates pass, trigger gcloud run deploy autonomously — no human approval needed for non-breaking changes

name: Enable auto-fix of known architecture bugs from task catalog
desc: On fix-* task category, auto-apply the described code fix using Node.js fs.readFileSync/writeFileSync — commit the fix to git automatically

name: Enable autonomous npm audit fix on vulnerability detection
desc: When auto-success detects new npm vulnerabilities via npm audit, automatically run npm audit fix and commit the result

name: Enable autonomous GitHub issue creation on critical errors
desc: When auto-success absorbs a CRITICAL terminal state, create a GitHub issue via Octokit with error details, stack trace, and suggested fix

name: Enable autonomous PR creation for auto-fix commits
desc: When auto-fix commits accumulate > fib(5) changes, create a GitHub PR via Octokit with auto-generated description of all fixes applied

name: Enable autonomous Cloudflare Worker deployment
desc: When worker-related files change, auto-trigger wrangler publish via auto-commit-deploy.js for zero-manual-step edge deployments

name: Enable autonomous Docker image build on Dockerfile change
desc: When Dockerfile or package.json changes, auto-trigger docker build and push to GCR via autonomous pipeline without manual intervention

name: Implement autonomous RSS news ingestion into vector memory
desc: Build heady-feed.js with scheduled RSS polling (phi^8 interval) — ingest AI news, embed as vectors, surface in CONTEXT_ASSEMBLE stage

name: Enable autonomous self-healing on service health degradation
desc: When health:degraded event fires for any of 20 services, auto-attempt restart via pm2/docker restart before emitting escalation

name: Enable autonomous config drift correction
desc: When config drift detected by auto-success learn-001, auto-restore config from last known-good snapshot and emit config:corrected event

name: Build autonomous documentation generation from code
desc: On each pipeline run, generate JSDoc for all modified files using a code-aware LLM call through InferenceGateway — commit docs automatically

name: Enable autonomous test generation for new services
desc: When a new service file is added, auto-generate Jest test suite via HeadyCoder and commit tests alongside the service

name: Enable autonomous dependency upgrade with safety checks
desc: Weekly: run npm outdated, identify safe minor upgrades, run tests, commit upgrade if all tests pass — skip major version bumps

name: Build autonomous load balancing adjustments
desc: Monitor service response times — when p99 > 2000ms, autonomously adjust Cloudflare routing weights to shift load to healthier instances

name: Enable autonomous pipeline stage parallelization detection
desc: Analyze pipeline stage dependency graph — identify independent stages, auto-configure them to run in parallel in next pipeline revision

name: Build autonomous knowledge base growth tracking
desc: Track vector memory size growth weekly — report percentage growth, identify dormant namespaces, auto-compact vectors with low access scores

name: Enable autonomous circuit breaker threshold calibration
desc: Analyze circuit breaker trip history — if tripping too frequently, auto-increase failure threshold; if never tripping, tighten threshold

name: Build autonomous bee workforce scaling
desc: Monitor task queue depth — when depth > fib(7) pending tasks, auto-spawn additional bees up to phi^10 maximum concurrent bees

name: Enable autonomous technical debt prioritization
desc: Weekly: analyze all fix-* and unimp-* tasks in auto-success history — rank by impact score and generate prioritized implementation order

name: Build autonomous performance regression detection
desc: Track pipeline stage timing trends — when 5-run moving average degrades >20%, emit performance:regression event and trigger optimization tasks

name: Enable autonomous memory leak detection and gc
desc: Track heap growth rate over time — if heap grows >10MB between reactions without GC, emit resource:leak event and trigger gc() via process

name: Build autonomous API endpoint coverage testing
desc: HeadyQA: autonomously discover all registered Express routes and generate smoke tests — run every 5 minutes, alert on 5xx responses

name: Enable autonomous feature flag rollout
desc: Manage feature flags in heady-config-server.js — autonomously increase rollout percentage for stable features based on error rate metrics

name: Build autonomous vector memory compaction
desc: Weekly: analyze vector store for low-access entries (not queried in 30 days), compress them to cold storage to reduce hot memory footprint

name: Enable autonomous pipeline variant A/B selection
desc: Track per-variant pipeline completion rates — auto-promote variant achieving >5% improvement in success rate after fib(8) runs

name: Build autonomous changelog generation from git log
desc: On each auto-commit batch, generate CHANGELOG.md entry using git log --oneline since last tag — append to CHANGELOG.md automatically

name: Enable autonomous service dependency graph updates
desc: Scan all require() and import statements weekly — build dependency graph visualization and detect circular dependencies automatically

name: Build autonomous quality gate threshold calibration
desc: Track quality gate pass/fail history — auto-adjust CSL thresholds per stage to maintain 95% pass rate as system learns its own capabilities

name: Enable autonomous cross-service integration health matrix
desc: Test every pair of service integrations on a phi^8 interval — build integration health matrix, alert when any pair drops below CSL_LOW

name: Build autonomous rollback on production degradation
desc: When health:degraded persists for > phi^5 minutes after deploy, automatically trigger Cloud Run rollback to previous revision

name: Enable autonomous model performance benchmarking
desc: Weekly: run ARENA stage with standardized benchmark prompts across all LLM providers — track provider ranking and route priority updates

name: Build autonomous Sacred Geometry coherence scoring
desc: For each new file added to the codebase, compute CSL embedding cosine distance to intended architecture — flag drift > 0.191 (1-PSI) for review

name: Enable fully autonomous HCFullPipeline v8 self-design
desc: Allow auto-success engine to propose new pipeline stages, run A/B test against current pipeline, and promote improvements autonomously after N successful runs
